summary: DEIMoS functionality includes feature detection, feature alignment, collision cross section calibration, isotope detection, and MS/MS spectral deconvolution.

DEIMoS achieved an r-squared value of 0.9999784552958134 in CCS calibration for positive ions. DEIMoS achieved an r-squared value of 0.9999784552958121 in CCS calibration for negative ions using the tunemix function.
